entries.definition:
b–ʾ–r a well, to dig a well; to treasure, to hide, to do good. Of
this root, بِئْر biʾr occurs once in the Qurʾan.

بِئْر biʾr [n. fem.] a well (22:45) وَبِئْرٍ مُّعَطَّلَةٍ وَقَصْرٍ مَّشِيدٍ [how many]
a deserted well; and [how many] a lofty palace.
